signup.title: Signup bonus
signup.description: New accounts receive {credits} free credits for GPT Image 2.
signup.label: One time

referral.title: Invite friends
referral.description: Earn {credits} credits when a friend signs up. When that friend buys their first subscription, both of you get {percent}% extra subscription credits. The extra bonus applies only to the first subscription purchase.
referral.label: {credits} signup + {percent}% first subscription

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.description: Come back each day and claim free credits.
checkin.label: Daily
